explanation: The user's instruction is to put an apple in the fridge. Since the robot is not currently holding the apple, the first step is to pick it up. The apple is referred to as a discussed object with no suffix in the state, so we use apple_0. After picking it up, the robot must move to the fridge using the Go_to action. Finally, the apple is placed into the fridge. This plan follows the rules of holding one object at a time and placing only when holding the object. No slicing or other actions are needed as the task is simply to store the apple in the fridge.
